title: Certificate PDF generation + secure download (composes storeFile/signedUrl + cert identity)
business_reason: FR-CERT-GENERATION-0004 made the certificate's identity server-controlled + publicly verifiable but the certificate FILE itself is never produced (certificates.pdf_file stays null; gap 'no real file'). Generate a real PDF credential on the generate transition (workflow guard certificate_file_created), store it privately (FR-SECURE-FILE-DOWNLOAD-0003 storeFile), and serve it as a scoped, audited, short-lived signed download to staff + the owning school — turning the three prior CRs into a complete certificate flow.

design.deps: pdf-lib + qrcode (pure-JS, no native deps; Node runtime).
design.render: server/certificates/certPdf.ts renderCertificatePdf({certificate_number, candidate_name, olympiad_name, award, issued_on, verification_code, verify_url}) -> PDF Buffer; embeds a QR of verify_url (qrPayload) pointing at /verify/certificate/[code].
design.generate_effect: kernel domain effect core_certificates:generate -> render PDF (candidate_name via students lookup) -> storeFile(bucket 'certificate-files', ownerTable certificates) -> set certificates.pdf_file=file_id. Best-effort; download 409s until present.
design.download: secure PDF download via makeSecureDownloadHandler(fileColumn=pdf_file): staff custom /api/staff/core/certificates/[id]/file + school gen_school securedl /api/school/certificates/[id]/file. Gated to generated/published/downloaded; ownsRecord scope; audited; 900s signed URL.
design.ui: ModuleTable downloadAction (Download PDF) on the staff core certificates + school certificates pages. The existing code-based /download (public verify URL) is retained for the QR/verify link.

param_14.question: How is the certificate PDF produced, stored, and securely downloaded by staff and the owning school?
param_14.answer: On generate, the server renders a PDF (with the candidate name, award, certificate number, verification code and a QR pointing at the public verify page), stores it in a private bucket via storeFile, and links it via certificates.pdf_file. Staff and the owning school download it through the signed-URL factory (scope-checked, audited, 900s). The verify page/QR proves authenticity independently.
param_14.answer_source: certificate_ops/workflows.json (mark_generated guard certificate_file_created + qr_payload_created), qr_policy.json, download_policy.json, digital_signature_policy.json, FR-SECURE-FILE-DOWNLOAD-0003, server/eval/certificate.ts qrPayload
param_14.security_implications: PDF lives in a PRIVATE bucket; only scoped, short-lived signed URLs are issued (skill 10); download is ownsRecord-gated (school own-scope, staff assignment) + audited; the raw object path is never returned/logged; the QR encodes only the public verify URL (no PII); revoked certs still show revoked publicly.
param_14.approval_implications: none new; generate is write-class, download is a gated read.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: Reuses storeFile/signedUrl (FR-0003) + cert identity (FR-0004). Digital-signature/seal + tamper hash on the PDF deferred. record_download status transition (published->downloaded) not auto-fired here.
param_14.assumptions: pdf-lib + qrcode installable (pure JS); Node runtime for the effect/routes; certificate-files bucket auto-provisioned by storeFile.ensureBucket.
